nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values: Anime style, indoor office scene at night. A cute mouse-eared maid with short platinum blonde hair sits at a desk in front of a computer. She types quickly on the keyboard with a serious, focused expression, her red eyes narrowed in concentration. As the video progresses, her expression softens and transforms into joyful surprise. She clasps her hands together near her chin, smiling warmly at the screen as if receiving exciting news. Subtle desk lamp lighting creates soft shadows; the background shows organized document folders and a deep blue wall. Vlog-style, high detail, smooth facial transition.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Anime style, indoor office scene at night. The cute mouse-eared maid with short platinum blonde hair leans closer to the monitor, her red eyes shimmering with excitement. She pushes her chair back slightly and rises to her feet, clasping the sides of the desk while looking at the screen with a wide, joyful grin. Her tail flicks energetically behind her, and the soft desk lamp light catches the gentle movement of her hair. She spins around from the desk, holding her hands against her chest, taking a small, playful hop in place. The camera follows in a vlog-style motion, capturing her warm smile and animated body language in high detail, with smooth transitions and lifelike movement. The background remains softly lit with the organized folders and deep blue wall.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Anime style, indoor office scene at night. The cute mouse-eared maid with short platinum blonde hair steps away from the desk, still glowing with happiness. She twirls gracefully in the middle of the room, skirt and tail swaying with the motion, her red eyes sparkling. She picks up a small plush mascot from a nearby shelf and hugs it tightly against her chest, spinning once more before flopping back into her chair with a satisfied sigh then putting the small plush mascot on the desk. The camera keeps the vlog-style framing, slowly panning to catch her relaxed smile as she leans back, gazing at the monitor. Soft desk lamp light and the deep blue wall create a cozy, intimate mood, with every movement rendered in high detail and smooth animation.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Anime style, indoor office scene at night. The cute mouse-eared maid with short platinum blonde hair suddenly pushes her chair back and stands, leaning over the desk to get a closer look at the monitor. Her red eyes widen in curiosity as she scrolls quickly with the mouse, tail flicking behind her. She taps the screen lightly with one finger, as if pointing something out to the viewer, then turns her head toward the camera with a questioning look. The soft desk lamp glow highlights the curve of her cheek and the subtle shimmer in her hair, while the organized folders and deep blue wall remain in the background.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Anime style, indoor office scene at night. The mouse-eared maid suddenly smiles brightly, spinning her chair halfway toward the camera while pointing excitedly back at the monitor as if sharing something amazing. Her short platinum hair and ears bounce slightly with the movement, and her red eyes sparkle in the warm desk lamp glow. She gives a quick, playful wave to the viewer before turning back to the screen, tail swaying in a happy rhythm.
